prompt: Create an ultra-realistic vertical cinematic fashion editorial portrait of an 18-year-old young woman standing indoors in a warm minimalist apartment or studio. She is framed from upper thighs to head, centered, with a relaxed confident pose: one arm down with a bent elbow, the other hand resting lightly near her waist. She wears an oversized rust-orange button-up shirt with a soft cotton/linen texture, open collar, visible front buttons, dropped shoulders, and sleeves rolled up to the forearms. Add exactly 3 visible accessories: clear-framed eyeglasses resting on top of her head, a small stud earring on one ear, and a silver wristwatch on her right wrist. Her hair is a modern layered medium-length wolf cut with soft volume, natural texture, tousled outward layers, and dark brown with subtle warm highlights. Keep the face area intentionally covered by a centered vertical rectangular privacy block in a medium warm brown color, obscuring all facial features from forehead to chin while leaving the hair, ears, neck, and outfit visible. Use warm natural window light, shallow depth of field, creamy beige background blur, high-end editorial photography, realistic skin on visible neck and hands, subtle fabric wrinkles, soft shadows, 85mm lens look, f/1.8 bokeh, natural color grading, no text, no watermark, no extra people.
